text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-We finally meet again, my rebel…
Ah! I-I mean, rival!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh… I'm so, so, so sorry!
I screwed up my lines!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't even read a script right. I'm sorry
I'm so worthless, and stupid, and… and…

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The rhythm of your speech… You were born
to play a minstrel! Yes, that's it! I'm changing
your role!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are now a humble minstrel seeking an
audience with me, the king… or so you claim!
You're actually there to kill me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us continue! Perform your next lines
with an apologetic flair!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry, Your Majesty, but your life ends
here. D-D-D-Die by my blade, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I find your pain so exquisite!
Please forgive me for sending you to
the depths of Hades!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa-ha-ha-ha-ha! Yes, yes, YES!
The juxtaposition of madness and
comedy is truly magnificent!
